comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Found realtime author-loss risk for evaluations: subscription selection sets and update merge paths did not consistently carry createdByUserId, so Gen2 updates could replace a rendered evaluation with an authorless payload. Patching subscription fields and merge preservation before further UI testing.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented actor attribution propagation, evaluation author realtime preservation, and verified a fresh optimizer procedure created a tagged child evaluation.
